mapper.insert: INSERT INTO winner (participant_id, prize_id, prize_status) VALUES (#{participantId}, #{prizeId}, #{prizeStatus})

INSERT INTO winner (participant_id, prize_id, prize_status) VALUES
(#{w.participantId}, #{w.prizeId}, #{w.prizeStatus})
mapper.update: UPDATE winner SET prize_status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ep.rank_type as rankType, ep.prize_name as prizeName, COUNT(w.id) as cnt FROM winner w JOIN event_prize ep ON w.prize_id = ep.id WHERE ep.event_id = #{eventId} GROUP BY ep.id ORDER BY ep.rank_type ASC
SELECT w.participant_id FROM winner w JOIN participant p ON w.participant_id = p.id WHERE p.event_id = #{eventId} AND w.prize_status = 'UNCHECKED'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM winner WHERE participant_id IN (SELECT id FROM participant WHERE event_id = #{eventId})
